rationale: The previous attempt only did reflexive `P == P` touches, which do not expose the per-conjunct structure of `next_ensures`. Here each `A ==> B` assertion is discharged by direct unfolding of the open spec `next_ensures`, and the same conjunct is materialized for both `r1` and `r2`. This puts matching e-graph nodes for `ok`, `invariants`, `next`, `event_seq`, `well_typed_events`, and the recvs/clocks/sends sequences (with Seq extensionality `=~=`) side-by-side at both runs, giving z3 the trigger correspondence it needs to line up the inner quantifiers in `det_receive_packet_next_equal`.
